title: Learning Module (adaptive capability module)
description: A plug-and-play learning module. Every module MUST contain the 7 mission-required parts and MUST be adapted to each of the 5 personas. Enforces mission Pillar 1 + Day 1 progressive complexity.

one_liner.description: What a learner can do after this module.

owns_loop_stage.description: Which closed-loop stage this module primarily teaches.

source_day.description: Which whitepaper day(s) ground this module — provenance (Principle #4).

parts.description: The 7 mission-required parts. All are required.

plain_explanation.description: Part 1 — plain-language explanation a motivated 15-year-old understands.

concrete_example.description: Part 2 — a concrete, not abstract, example.

real_world_use_case.description: Part 4 — where this matters in production / a business.

failure_mode.description: Part 5 — a named failure mode / anti-pattern to avoid.

measurable_output.description: Part 6 — the artifact + how you measure it worked (Day 4).

next_step.description: Part 7 — recommended next step, keyed to learner level.
